narrative: Driver pre-trip inspection 2026-05-21 05:30 for run 4471. Last DVIR reviewed: prior driver reported no defects; repairs not required. Brake system: air pressure build to 120 psi, leak test 2 psi/min single (within 3 psi limit), 3 psi/min combo (within 4 psi limit), low-air warning at 58 psi, parking brake holds 20% grade. Steering free-play 8°, within 10° spec. All lights operational. Tires: steer 6/32, drives 4/32, all above thresholds. Coupling fifth wheel locked, safety chains secured. Cargo securement per 393 Subpart I verified. Triangles + extinguisher + HOS-compliant ELD all present. Driver fit-for-duty.
